channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: NIS2 vs DORA: Which EU Regulation Applies to Your SaaS Product in 2026?
item.description: If you build SaaS products and serve European customers, two major EU regulations are demanding your attention right now NIS2 and DORA. But which one actually applies to you? And what happens if...

item.title: Testing in Go — Table-Driven Tests, Benchmarks, and go test Habits
item.description: Testing in Go — Table-Driven Tests, Benchmarks, and go test Habits In part 5 I built a working Orders API with Gin — routes, middleware, an in-memory store, and proper error handling. This time...

item.title: Arabic OCR with an API: Make Scanned Arabic PDFs Searchable (Python)
item.description: If you've ever tried to extract text from a scanned Arabic document, you already know the pain. Most OCR tooling is built English-first. Arabic adds three problems on top: Right-to-left (RTL) text...

item.title: The best Prime Day deals we found on our favorite gear
item.description: Amazon’s Prime Day is on, and it’s happening for the next four days. Prime members can jump into the deals now until the sale officially ends at 3:01AM ET / 12:01AM PT June 27th. Many discounts...

item.title: AI coding for builders, not just engineers: the Desktop / Cloud / Agent map (mid-2026)
item.description: Three weeks ago I published Every AI Coding CLI in 2026: the complete map. It was a list for engineers in terminals. Most readers of AI coding tools are not engineers. They are builders,...

item.title: We Renamed the DevOps Team 'Platform Engineering.' Nothing Changed. Here's Why.
item.description: And what it actually takes to make the transition real. Sound Familiar? A leadership meeting. A slide deck. A reorg announcement. The DevOps team is now called the Platform Engineering team. The...

item.title: Every API Will Be Rebuilt for Agents
item.description: MCP solves the plug. It doesn't solve the verb gap. Hand a coding agent a beautifully documented REST API — versioned, OpenAPI'd, the kind a human developer would happily build against — wrap it...

item.title: Український лематизатор тепер вбудовано в Manticore Search
item.description: Коротко починаючи з релізу 27.1.5 український лематизатор більше не потребує окремого Python-стека. Раніше потрібно було встановлювати окремий пакет, Python 3.9, pymorphy2 і українські словники....

item.title: Bye AZ-204, hello AI-200: What you need to know about the new Azure developer certification
item.description: Hi lovely readers, If you have been working toward your AZ-204 certification or have been thinking about starting, there is something important you need to know. Microsoft has officially announced...

item.title: How I built a counter program in Anchor and learned to trust my tests
item.description: The counter program is small, but the useful part was not the counter. The useful part was learning where state lives, how Anchor turns account validation into Rust types, and how a test suite can...

item.title: Agent Runtime Was the GitHub Trending Story of 2025 and the Juejin IDE Rankings Missed It
item.description: I spent the morning going through the 2025 Juejin GitHub trending recaps back to back — April, May, June, and October — and the thing that finally crystallized for me is that one category of...

item.title: Anthropic’s Fable 5 Model Jailbroken Within Days
item.description: Fable 5 is the supposed safe version of Anthropic’s Mythos Preview, with guardrails to ensure that it can’t be used to create cyberattacks. Well, that restriction was bypassed within days.

item.title: These are the best smart home deals this Prime Day
item.description: Every Prime Day is a good day to make your home smarter, as deals on connected gear proliferate not just on Amazon but all across the web. And this Prime Day is no different. I sifted through...

item.title: The best robot vacuum deals available during Prime Day
item.description: If you’ve been wanting to buy a robot vacuum but have been put off by how much it can cost to get a good one, now is not a bad time to start looking. Prime Day has kicked off, though more than...

item.title: The best Apple deals you can get during Prime Day
item.description: Amazon’s Prime Day sale is here, and whether you’re looking for a new pair of wireless earbuds or a smartwatch, there’s a good chance you’ll find a discount. The Apple Watch Series 11 has already...

item.title: The Verge’s guide to Amazon Prime Day 2026
item.description: Amazon Prime Day 2026 is happening now and is delivering some of the best deals we’ve seen this summer. As expected, there were a ton of price drops at Amazon, Best Buy, and Walmart on a range of...

item.title: Elephant alert! AI warning systems aim to avoid deadly clashes
item.description: India is home to about 60% of the world’s wild Asian elephants, and around 80% of the animals’ habitat lies outside protected areas, according to the Ministry of Environment, Forest, and Climate...

item.title: The $400 million machine powering the future of chipmaking
item.description: Jos Benschop is climbing a ladder to get to the top of his newest machine. It’s a bit of a schlep. The contraption is the size of a double-decker bus—more than 150 tons of gleaming...

item.title: Malicious npm Packages Pose as PostCSS Tools to Deliver Windows RAT
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a set of malicious npm packages that are designed to deliver a Windows-based remote access trojan (RAT). The list of identified packages, is below -...

item.title: Amflow’s TL e-bike is ready for baby’s first mountain adventure
item.description: Amflow, the e-bike brand spun out of DJI, just announced its TL Carbon, a do-it-all "eSUV" suitable for both bikepacking adventures and dropping the kid at daycare on your cycle to work. The TL...

item.title: WhatsApp VBScript Campaign Uses Fake Documents to Install ManageEngine RMM Tool
item.description: Direct messages sent via WhatsApp are being used to distribute malicious Visual Basic Script (VBScript) files that lead to the installation of legitimate Remote Monitoring and Management (RMM)...

item.title: OpenAI Expands Daybreak With GPT-5.5-Cyber to Help Defenders Patch Security Flaws
item.description: OpenAI on Monday said it's releasing an improved version of its GPT‑5.5‑Cyber model to trusted defenders as part of the Daybreak initiative the artificial intelligence (AI) company announced last...

item.title: The running list: major tech layoffs in 2026 where employers cited AI
item.description: A running look — in reverse chronological order — at the bigger tech companies that have announced significant layoffs this year with AI as a stated factor.

item.title: OpenAI launches new initiative to help find and patch open source bugs
item.description: OpenAI is using AI to help the open source community better protect itself.

item.title: How Omio is building the future of conversational travel
item.description: Discover how Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences, accelerate product development, and transform into an AI-native company.

item.title: Shipping huggingface_hub every week with AI, open tools, and a human in the loop
Nvidia says its AI data center design runs hotter to use a lot less water
item.description: Public pushback against data centers has emphasized their water and energy consumption, and now Nvidia is highlighting its claim that the Rubin generation reference design for a fully...

item.title: Meta Pauses Employee-Tracking Program Following Internal Data Leak
item.description: The move comes after the company left potentially sensitive data from the initiative exposed internally.

item.title: Valve describes just how brutal RAM negotiations are in 2026
item.description: Valve's Steam Machine finally has a price: a whopping $1,049 for the 512GB configuration or $1,349 for the 2TB version. And those are without bundled controllers, which drive up the cost more. The...
